creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Scenario:
- FreeBSD stable/14
- latest ports
- updated security/gnupg to 2.4.6 using portmaster

Result:
- On every invocation, gpg complains as follows:

gpg: NOTE: THIS IS A DEVELOPMENT VERSION!
gpg: It is only intended for test purposes and should NOT be
gpg: used in a production environment or with production keys!

Expected result:
- There should not be such a complaint, and a proper version of gnupg should be installed.

-- Martin
